core_mechanism: a smooth turning-point (bounce) in a governing dynamical system, where a monotonically contracting state variable reverses to a monotonically expanding one by passing through a regular extremum instead of a singular/degenerate limit point — optionally closing into a periodic (cyclic) orbit
brief_reason: The abstract centers on solutions that pass from an accelerated-collapse era to an expanding era without a singularity, plus cyclic variants, which is exactly a regularized turning-point reversal (and periodic orbit) of a dynamical trajectory that avoids a singular point.
